info.title: Orbis News Analysis API
info.description:
Multi-country news article monitoring and analysis platform. Provides article search, cluster management, email agents, RSS feeds, and AI-powered content analysis.

**Legacy API:** The original multi-Lambda endpoints remain available. This v2 API consolidates them into a single service with consistent REST conventions and full OpenAPI documentation.

get.summary: List all clusters for a user
get.description: Returns all article clusters (topic monitors) for a user with new article counts.
Returns the saved search form, RSS URL, file exports, and sharing info for a cluster.

post.description: Create a new keyword or contextual article monitor.

put.description: Replace the search criteria and title of an existing cluster.

delete.description: Soft-delete a cluster. Set inactive=2 to archive instead.

post.description: Record that the user has viewed this cluster, resetting the new article counter.

get.description: Returns articles within a cluster with optional keyword, site, and availability filters.

put.description: Increment the click counter for an article.

delete.description: Removes all articles in a thread from the cluster.

post.description: Create a new label for organising articles within a cluster.
Applies a label to all articles in a thread within the cluster.

put.description: Change the text and/or colour of a label.

post.description: Creates a shared copy of the cluster for each target user.
Generates an RSS feed for a cluster and returns the public S3 URL.
Generates an Excel export of cluster articles and returns the S3 URL.

get.description: Returns all email notification agents for a user.

post.description: Create an automated email notification agent with optional job schedules and subscriptions.

get.description: Returns all active news sites for a country as {value: site_id, label: short_name}.

schema.title: Response Get Sites V2 Platform Sites Get

get.description: Returns the AI models available for content analysis with pricing.

post.description: Calculates the estimated cost and article count for running AI analysis over recent articles, optionally filtered by keywords.
Returns article publication counts, minutes on frontpage, and thread counts over a date range. Optionally filtered by keywords with baseline comparison.
Returns the most widely covered stories from the last 24 hours, ranked by site coverage.

get.description: Search articles by keyword. Returns matching articles with site and availability metadata.

post.description: Converts the query to an embedding and finds semantically similar articles using the Pinecone vector database.

get.description: Finds articles similar to the given article using vector similarity.
Returns aggregated metadata (site counts, availability, date range) for building filter UIs.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: Required if user_email is not provided

user_email.title: User Email
user_email.description: Required if user_id is not provided

search_text.title: Search Text
search_text.description: Keywords to monitor. Either a plain string or a list of KeywordItem objects with optional strict matching.

article_ids.title: Article Ids
article_ids.description: Pre-populate the cluster with specific article IDs

user_form.title: User Form
user_form.description: Custom form data stored alongside the cluster

strict.title: Strict
strict.description: True = exact phrase match (word boundaries required). False = all words must appear anywhere in the text.

to_user_ids.title: To User Ids
to_user_ids.description: User IDs to share the cluster with

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: Required if user_email is not provided

user_email.title: User Email
user_email.description: Required if user_id is not provided

search_text.title: Search Text
search_text.description: Keywords to monitor. Either a plain string or a list of KeywordItem objects with optional strict matching.

article_ids.title: Article Ids
article_ids.description: Pre-populate the cluster with specific article IDs

user_form.title: User Form
user_form.description: Custom form data stored alongside the cluster

user_cluster_id.title: User Cluster Id
user_cluster_id.description: ID of the cluster to update

tags.name: Articles
tags.description: Article retrieval, click tracking, and sharing
